message:
audit: deep notify.rs audit (1218L SOUND) + improved CRLF test assertion

Deep audit: src/sync/notify.rs (1218 lines) — SOUND. Verified WaiterSlab
management, pass_baton cancel-safety, generation-based broadcast semantics,
scan cursor optimization, and tail-shrinking. No lost wakeups, no
double-decrements on active counter.

Includes: improved CRLF injection test in websocket handshake (line count +
per-header verification).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
